\tzpentry{ID3295}{Alfven Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3295 introduces Alfven Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \rho_{effective} = - \frac{B^2}{2 \mu_0} \left( 1 - \frac{v_A^2}{c^2} \right) \end{equation}
